basic_details.job_title: IIT Ropar Postdoctoral Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar) Postdoctoral Research Fellow - Electronics/Communication/Electrical Notification 2026 has been released under Advt. No. U80100PB2020NPL051623 on the official website of IIT Ropar. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Ropar Postdoctoral Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in EC, EE, or equivalent with good performance
qualification.details: Postdoctoral Research Fellow - Electronics/Communication/Electrical: PhD in EC, EE, or equivalent with good performance. Experience of working with wireless signals, Basic understanding of antenna systems, Prior experience in publishing peer-reviewed research.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Ropar Postdoctoral Research Fellow - Electronics/Communication/Electrical Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Ropar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Ropar Postdoctoral Research Fellow - Electronics/Communication/Electrical Job 2026 Noti

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Postdoctoral Research Fellow position at IIT Ropar?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Postdoctoral Research Fellow position at IIT Ropar is 30th June 2026. It is advisable to submit your application well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for this role?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a PhD in Electronics/Communication/Electrical Engineering or an equivalent discipline with a good academic record and performance.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age limit for the Postdoctoral Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Yes, the maximum age limit for the Postdoctoral Research Fellow position is 38 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this Postdoctoral Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Postdoctoral Research Fellow position will be as per DST Norms, which are standard guidelines for such research positions.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Postdoctoral Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the link provided in the "Important Links" section of this article or by visiting the official website of IIT Ropar.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Postdoctoral Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Postdoctoral Research Fellow position at IIT Ropar.

faq.question: Q7. What specific experience is preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Preferred experience includes working with wireless signals, a basic understanding of antenna systems, and prior experience in publishing peer-reviewed research.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this Postdoctoral Research Fellow position is contract-based.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The link to download the official notification PDF can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article.
